name: Rosa's Kitchen
hours_note: Rosa still does the Sunday roast herself. Kitchen closes 30 minutes before posted hours.

reviews.author: Angela F.
reviews.text: Rosa came out to check on our table when my son wouldn't touch the vegetables. She brought him potatoes from the back — that's the kind of place this is.

reviews.author: Tom H.
reviews.text: Sunday roast is the reason we drive across town. Portions feed three if you're not greedy.

reviews.author: Linda G.
reviews.text: Cash and card. Kids get crayons and a bowl of tortilla chips while you wait.

items.name: Sunday roast
items.description: Beef, Yorkshire pudding, gravy — Sundays from 11 AM until gone

items.name: Rosa's enchiladas
items.description: Family recipe, red or green sauce

items.name: Homemade pie
items.description: Ask what's in the case today

owner_story: Rosa opened this kitchen in 1998 after twenty years cooking for her extended family. The Sunday roast started as a once-a-month gathering for neighbors on Elm Street — now it's the line out the door.
owner_provided_notes: Family-run neighborhood kitchen. Rosa is usually in the dining room on weekends.
headline: Rosa's Sunday roast on Elm Street
